description: Join us for the Vietnam NFT and GameFi Expo 2021, organized by Binance Vietnam. This four-hour online event features discussions with experts on NFTs, blockchain gaming, and investment opportunities in the gaming industry.
topic_summary: The event covers the state of the gaming industry in Vietnam, workshops for game designers and developers, the rise of NFT gaming, and investment perspectives on NFTs. A total prize pool of $3,000 is available through airdrops for participants.
